title: Argyreia boholensis
taxonomy: Argyreia boholensis is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. It is a type of morning glory native to the Philippines. The plant is classified as a perennial vine, characterized by its heart-shaped leaves and trumpet-shaped flowers. Its classification into the genus Argyreia is further grouped under the family Convolvulaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as bindweeds and morning glories. Argyreia boholensis is a unique and endemic species to the Philippines, and its classification highlights its distinct characteristics and relationships within the plant kingdom.
